# Data Wrangling & Visualization

## Data Manipulation with Pandas

{{< include _pandas.qmd >}}

## Grammar of Graphics

{{< include _grammar_of_graphics.qmd >}}

{{< include visualizing-spatial-data/_visualizing_spatial_data.qmd >}}

{{< include intro-powerbi-tableau/_intro_powerbi_tableau.qmd >}}
